steps.title: Set up
steps.content: Maya has 73 signatures and needs at least 120. Let $x$ = additional signatures needed:$$73 + x \geq 120$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above matches Choice A — 47, 47, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore A.
